free_text: Study of 31P with the 29Si(3He,p)31P reaction
photographic emulsions placed in
focal plane of a multi-angle spectrograph
SiO2 sample enriched in 29Si to
95% with thickness of 40mug/cm**2 evaporated on
35 mug/cm**2 Au backing
compiled by S.H.
SD: Subent 034 was deleted (data are
moved to Subents 2-33 in COMMENT). BIB update.
Data were redigitized in Subents 5,8-12,14,16,17.
Subents 30-33 deleted - duplication with Subents 23-26.

maximum without angle that equal to 938. mu-b/sr.
